mapper.select:
select * from ( select id as id, stock_virtual_no stockVirtualNo, contract_type contractType, company_name companyName, product_name productName, factory_name factoryName, brand_number brandNumber, deal_number dealNumber, deal_price dealPrice, FORMAT(total_amount, 3) totalAmountStr, total_amount totalAmount, date_format(delivery_date, '%Y-%m-%d') deliveryDate, date_format(pay_full_time, '%Y-%m-%d') payFullTime, date_format(publish_time, '%Y-%m-%d') publicTime, delivery_type 'deliveryType', date_format(arrival_time_ext, '%Y-%m-%d') arrivalTimeExt, status status, delivery_addr deliveryAddr, match_user_name matchUserName from t_stock_virtual order by created_date desc limit 200 ) as c
concat(productName,'/', brandNumber,'/',factoryName) like concat('%',#{productName},'%')
